# Case Study Evidence Table

| Case | Domain | Evidence class | Main use in argument |
|---|---|---|---|
| PhotobookShop / ACCC | Influencer marketing | Regulator action | Hidden material connection and edited testimonial |
| FTC fake reviews rule | Reviews / testimonials | Regulator rule | Legal boundary for fake social proof |
| YouTube fake engagement policy | Social video | Platform policy | Boundary for artificial views/likes/comments |
| LinkedIn engagement pods update | Professional social | Platform update | Boundary for inauthentic professional engagement |
| GitHub rank abuse policy | Developer ecosystem | Platform policy | Boundary for automated stars/follows |
| Apple discovery fraud report | App stores | Platform report | Ratings/reviews/charts as fraud targets |
| Google Ads Safety Report | Ads | Platform report | AI-scale scams and ad-policy enforcement |
| DOJ Michael Smith | Music streaming | Criminal case | AI content plus fake streams as monetary fraud |
| Deezer AI music update | Music streaming | Platform report | AI upload flood and fraudulent stream detection |
| Trap Plan / War Robots | Reddit marketing | Agency artifact + journalism | Native astroturfing and community camouflage |
| Geese / Chaotic Good | Music marketing | Journalism | Trend simulation and engineered cultural momentum |
| Cluely ARR | Startups | Journalism / admission | Metric inflation as legitimacy signal |
| Delve | Compliance/startups | Reported allegations + denial | Trust claims and evidence limits |
